Reflective governance evidence is registry-backed by the canonical SG-SPEC-0003 boundary contract and its explicit delegated integration map for continuation, proposal/queue control, and lower-boundary handoff signal children. This is semantic surface evidence, not raw runtime telemetry.

Intent mediation evidence is registry-backed by the canonical SG-SPEC-0007 boundary contract, the pre-spec semantic proposal, and delegated child surfaces for project-memory consultation and first-class pre-spec semantic kinds. This is semantic surface evidence, not raw runtime telemetry.

Project-memory consultation evidence is registry-backed by the conversation-memory policy, derived index/map/promotion-pressure surfaces, viewer contract guardrails, and regression tests. This keeps PageIndex-backed recall and other project memory as declared pre-canonical context rather than implicit canonical authority.

OperatorRequest evidence is registry-backed by the policy contract, packet normalization, pre-spec intent-layer sync, single-run routing, proposal-link recording, and operator manual coverage. It demonstrates one-run steering without granting canonical authority to the request itself.
